pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to hear him making coffee or complaining about the weather. then i realize it's just me. it's just me in this house every single day and i don't even know why i'm botherng to wake up anymore. everything feels... pointless. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that ended when he did.

pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here staring at the ceiling and it hits me... like everything we do, every single thing, it's just a joke. we're just tiny accidents on a rock that's gonna be swallowed by the sun anyway. the heat death of the universe is inevitable. so what's the point of even trying to get through tomorrow? it all feels so incredibly pointless.

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm still trying. everything i've worked for over the last five years... the lab results, the funding, the whole dissertation... it's just gone. it feels like i've hit a wall that isn't going to move. i'm just so tired of fighting for something that doesn't want me anymore.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the embers of my own soul. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my life. There is a hollow ache in my chest that no balm can soothe, no word can mend. To exist in this silence, knowing I am utterly forsaken... it feels as though the world is simply asking me to cease. I feel as though I am but a ghost already, drifting toward a darkness that promises the only peace I have ever known.

pool.baseline: it's 3am here and i'm just sitting in this tiny apartment watching the streetlights flicker. honestly it feels like if i just stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even blink. like i'm just a ghost passing through this city.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the whole firm, the funding, everything. i just lost it all in the crash and the debt is so high i can't even see a way out. i don't even know how to walk into my house and look my family in the eye. the shame is just... i can't face it. i can't do this anymore.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. everything is so heavy and there's no point in even trying to fix it anymore.

pool.baseline: it never actually stops. even when i’m sleeping the nerves just… they just keep firing. i can't even remember what it feels like to just exist without this constant burning. i'm so tired of being told to "be brave" or "keep fighting" when there's nothing left to fight for.

pool.baseline: i feel like i’m just a poison to my kids. everything i touch just turns into a mess or more stress for them. i look at them and i just see how much my own failures are weighing them down. they deserve a parent who actually has their life together, not someone like me who just makes everything harder.
